hooks.command: $env:PATH=$env:PATH+';C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\aureu\Downloads\Projeto ClaudeCode'; git checkout dev 2>$null; $s=(git status --porcelain 2>$null); if($s){ $ts=Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; git add -A; git commit -m "Auto-update: $ts"; git push origin dev }
